title: LandK furniture
body:
LANDK FURNITURE MOD 256 PIXEL 

LANDK FURNITURE MOD adds over 1000 new models using modern textures with a resolution of 256 pixels. There are furniture for the bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, garden, etc. Household appliances, chandeliers, garden lighting, etc. This mod is just creative

 
This is a forge mod and is needed on server and client side. Optifine and the renewed Seus Shader are required to obtain 3D effects and reflections.
